Original: in a [Profession|PROFESSION] or [Discipline|DISCIPLINE], however with at least 1 Move Point remaining it may be Unpacked at any time.[BLANK-LINE]Moving your Settlement allows you to shift which [Tiles|TILE] are in your [Borders|BORDERS], making it possible to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Structures|STRUCTURE] on nearby [Deposits|DEPOSIT] and extending how far you receive free [Supply|SUPPLY].
Translation: 去学习[职业|PROFESSION]或[纪律|DISCIPLINE]；不过只要还剩至少 1 点移动力，它可以随时解除打包。[BLANK-LINE]移动定居点会改变哪些[地格|TILE]处于你的[边界|BORDERS]内，从而可以在附近[矿藏|DEPOSIT]上[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]，并扩大你获得免费[补给|SUPPLY]的范围。
